originalTitle: Twelve South’s AirFly Pro is a great travel companion, and it’s on sale for $40
summary: If you’ve got a summer trip coming up, the last-gen Twelve South AirFly Pro is one of those gadgets that can make a long flight feel a little shorter. It lets you use your wireless headphones with in-flight entertainment systems, and right now it’s on sale for $39.99 ($15 off) at Amazon. That’s the best […]
content: If you’ve got a summer trip coming up, the last-gen Twelve South AirFly Pro is one of those gadgets that can make a long flight feel a little shorter. It lets you use your wireless headphones with in-flight entertainment systems, and right now it’s on sale for $39.99 ($15 off) at Amazon. That’s the best price we’ve seen all year and just $7 shy of the all-time low we last saw in January 2025. [Product: Twelve South AirFly Pro | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07Z13G1P5?th=1&tag=theverge02-20] For just $5 more than the AirFly SE, the Pro adds a handful of useful extras, one of which is support for both Bluetooth transmitter and receiver modes. That means you can use your wireless headphones with an airplane’s entertainment system during a flight, then stream music from your phone to compatible wired speakers and sound systems once you’ve landed. Unlike the SE, it also supports two pairs of Bluetooth headphones at once, so you can share a movie or podcast with a travel companion. Plus, its 25 hour battery life should be enough to last through even the longest international flights. The AirFly Pro is useful in other ways, too. During your vacation, you can use it to connect your preferred music streaming service to an older rental car stereo, or your ear buds to a Nintendo Switch. Once you’re back home, it can also connect your wireless headphones to compatible gym equipment and other devices with a standard 3.5mm audio jack.
chineseTitle: Twelve South (Twelve South) 的 AirFly Pro 是绝佳的旅行伴侣，售价 40 美元
chineseSummary: 如果您即将进行夏季旅行，最新一代 Twelve South AirFly Pro 就是可以让长途飞行感觉更短的小工具之一。它可以让您将无线耳机与机上娱乐系统配合使用，目前在亚马逊上售价 39.99 美元（折扣 15 美元）。这是最好的[…]
chineseContent: 如果您即将进行夏季旅行，最新一代 Twelve South AirFly Pro 就是可以让长途飞行感觉更短的小工具之一。它可以让您将无线耳机与机上娱乐系统配合使用，目前在亚马逊上售价 39.99 美元（折扣 15 美元）。这是我们全年看到的最好价格，仅比 2025 年 1 月我们看到的历史最低价低 7 美元。 [产品：十二南 AirFly Pro | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07Z13G1P5?th=1&tag=theverge02-20] Pro 仅比 AirFly SE 贵 5 美元，增加了一些有用的附加功能，其中之一是支持蓝牙发射器和接收器模式。这意味着您可以在飞行期间将无线耳机与飞机的娱乐系统一起使用，然后在着陆后将音乐从手机传输到兼容的有线扬声器和音响系统。与 SE 不同的是，它还同时支持两副蓝牙耳机，因此您可以与旅行同伴分享电影或播客。此外，其 25 小时的电池续航时间应该足以支持最长的国际航班。 AirFly Pro 在其他方面也很有用。在度假期间，您可以使用它将您喜欢的音乐流媒体服务连接到旧的租赁汽车音响，或将您的耳塞连接到任天堂 Switch。当您回到家后，它还可以将您的无线耳机连接到兼容的健身器材和其他具有标准 3.5 毫米音频插孔的设备。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
